name: dispatch-optimizer
hook: vehicle dispatch optimization with operational constraints. python, OR-tools.

name: LLM-evaluation-framework
hook: an LLM eval framework where quality isn't one number. deterministic rules, stakeholder personas, LLM-as-judge. yaml in, html out, CI gates the whole thing.

name: MIT-SDM-Thesis-on-System-Dynamics-Modeling-of-Bitcoin
hook: MIT SDM thesis. system-dynamics model of bitcoin adoption, mining economics, and feedback loops.

name: world-food-program-robust-simulator
hook: robust optimization simulator for WFP food-aid distribution under demand and access uncertainty.

name: semiconductor-e2e-manufacturing-optimization
hook: wafer supply-chain optimization in streamlit. nominal, static-robust, and two-stage adaptive — compared under monte carlo.

name: Robust-Facility-Location
hook: robust facility-location under demand uncertainty. python + cvxpy.

name: News-Bias-Multi-Agent-Pipeline
hook: for-fun multi-agent pipeline: pull articles, summarize, detect bias, critique, summarize again. early experiment.

name: ai-supply-chain-copilot-prd
hook: PRD for an AI copilot that triages supply-chain exceptions. workflow tool with explicit trust boundaries, not a chatbot.

name: athena-site
hook: this site. doors, essays, lens paths, and the procurement-negotiation-lab embedded as the flagship demo.

name: chip-supply-chain-map
hook: the global semiconductor supply chain as a dependency graph. foundries, OSATs, equipment, substrates, EDA, hyperscalers, and chokepoints - with scenario toggles.

name: supplier-risk-rag-agent
hook: supplier-risk RAG agent with receipts. SEC filings in, cited answers out. retrieval, citation faithfulness, abstention, and regression evals wired into CI.

name: starforge-narrative-tools
hook: the python toolkit behind starforge canticles. prose-to-game schemas, conversion pipeline, validation gates.

name: starforge-renpy-demo
hook: act 1 of starforge canticles, rendered in ren'py. dialogue, combat vignettes, state systems.

name: starforge-rpg-prototype
hook: act 1 of starforge canticles, prototyped as a godot 4 RPG. party data, combat, branching dialogue, scene tooling.

name: procurement-negotiation-lab
hook: flagship interactive demo. an 8-level walkthrough of mechanism design for long-lead procurement: coordination gap, info trade-offs, walkaway zones, ADMM, VCG, multi-party splits, audits, and an authoring sandbox. cross-platform engine; mobile app on the way.
